hero.title: Your digital stage
hero.subtitle: One link for all your music, videos, merch and fans.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.

signup.title: Create your stage
signup.subtitle: Join thousands of artists on StageLink
signup.name: Full name

empty.title: Your page is ready
empty.description: Start adding blocks to build your artist page.

intro.title: Everything you can manage in StageLink, in one place
intro.description: Use this dashboard as your action hub: build your page, connect platform insights, publish your EPK, tune settings, and upgrade features as your artist project grows.

epk.title: Create my Press Kit (EPK)
epk.description: Turn your profile into a shareable Press Kit (EPK), then add only the extra booking, hospitality, and rider details that belong there.

analytics.title: View my analytics
analytics.description: Check StageLink traffic, advanced fan signals, and connected platform insights from one analytics workspace.
analytics.pro_plus_off: Platform Insights, advanced trends, and fan insights unlock on Pro+.
analytics.pro_plus_on: Your Pro+ workspace can already use connected platform insights here.

profile.title: Edit my profile
profile.description: Update your core artist identity, social links, SEO, and the platform references StageLink reuses across your public page, Press Kit (EPK), and Insights.

public_profile.title: View my public page
public_profile.description: Open your live StageLink page in a new tab and check exactly what fans see right now.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage plans, billing, and product connections like Shopify, Smart Merch, and StageLink Insights setup from one place.

page.title: My Page
page.description: Build and customize your artist page.
page.coming_soon_description: This is where you'll build your artist page with blocks, links, and media.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Track how your page is performing.

top_links.title: Top links
top_links.description: See which tracked links people are clicking the most in this period.
top_links.scope_note: This currently covers tracked clicks from page-builder links, profile links, and smart links. Broader event tracking for merch, purchases, and more lands in a future version.
top_links.label: Link
top_links.no_data: No link clicks recorded in this period.

empty.title: No activity yet
empty.description: Share your page to start seeing analytics.

error.title: Could not load analytics
error.description: There was a problem fetching your data. Please try again.

locked.title: Advanced analytics are locked
locked.description: Your current plan is {currentPlan}. Upgrade to {requiredPlan} to unlock a full 365-day view and advanced analytics features as they ship.
locked.one_tier_away: You're one tier away from unlocking this section in Pro+.

pro.title: Analytics Pro
pro.description: Richer trends and smart link performance built on the same clean analytics source of truth.
pro.locked_description: Your current plan is {currentPlan}. Advanced analytics are included in {requiredPlan}, while Free and Pro keep the basic overview. Upgrade to unlock richer trends and smart link performance.

trends.title: Advanced trends
trends.description: Daily trend lines for your core engagement signals across the selected range.

smart_links.title: Smart link performance
smart_links.description: This only counts Smart Links. It shows which ones got the most clicks, and how many people continued through their destination routing.
smart_links.scope_note: Profile links and regular page-builder links are not counted here. This table is only for Smart Links.
smart_links.label: Smart link
smart_links.empty: No Smart Link activity yet in this range.

fan_insights.title: Fan insights
fan_insights.description: These numbers come from your fan capture forms. They show how many people submitted the form, not who they were.
fan_insights.setup_note: Fan insights only work when you have at least one fan capture block published on your page.
fan_insights.locked_description: Your current plan is {currentPlan}. Fan insights are included in {requiredPlan}, while Free and Pro keep the basic analytics view. Upgrade to unlock fan capture trends and top capture blocks.

summary.captures_hint: Successful signup submissions recorded in this range.
summary.capture_rate_hint: Approximate rate based on captures divided by page views.
summary.page_views_hint: The page views used to compute the capture rate.

fan_insights.captures_over_time_description: Daily fan capture activity for the selected range.
fan_insights.captures_empty: No fan captures yet. Advanced fan insights will appear as your page starts collecting signups.
fan_insights.top_blocks_description: Which published fan capture blocks are bringing in the most successful signups.
fan_insights.top_blocks_empty: No capture blocks have generated signups in this range yet.
fan_insights.formula_note: Capture rate is shown as an approximation using the formula fan_capture_submit / page_view.

notes.basic_quality: Basic analytics · Bot filtering applied at ingestion · Unique visitor deduplication coming soon
notes.standard_quality: Bot & QA traffic excluded · Production events only · Unique visitor deduplication coming soon

insights_section.title: StageLink Insights
insights_section.description: Read your connected platform metrics here. Platform setup and account validation now live in Settings.

insights.title: StageLink Insights
insights.description: A unified analytics workspace for your connected artist platforms. Spotify is now live for artist profile basics, public audience signals, and top tracks, while the next platforms stay clearly marked as they come online.

help.connected_platforms: How many platform connections are active right now.
help.synced_platforms: How many connected platforms already have at least one stored sync.
help.stored_snapshots: Every successful sync stores a snapshot you can review later.
help.supported_platforms: Platforms modeled inside StageLink Insights today.

range.label: Snapshot range
range.description: Showing stored snapshots for {range}. This filters the history StageLink has already captured.

empty.title: Your unified artist insights start here
empty.description: Connect Spotify to pull your artist profile basics, public follower count, popularity, and top tracks into one StageLink dashboard.

locked.title: Unlock StageLink Insights
locked.description: Your current plan is {currentPlan}. Upgrade to {requiredPlan} to access the unified analytics dashboard for connected artist platforms.

error.title: Could not load StageLink Insights
error.description: Try again in a moment. If the problem persists, refresh the dashboard.

platform_card.ready_for_connection: Connection flow is already modeled for this platform.
platform_card.connection_flow_coming_soon: Connection flow lands in the next Epic. The data model and sync status are already prepared.
platform_card.no_snapshot: No snapshots stored yet for this platform.

spotify.setup_required: Spotify Insights needs `SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID` and `SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET` configured on this deployment before artists can connect.

fields.artist_input_hint: Paste a Spotify artist URL, Spotify artist URI, or the raw 22-character artist ID.

messages.connected: Spotify artist connected. Run a sync to pull the first snapshot.
messages.validate_error: Could not validate this Spotify artist right now.
messages.connect_error: Could not save this Spotify artist right now.
messages.sync_error: Could not sync Spotify insights right now.

top_tracks.title: Top tracks
top_tracks.empty: Spotify did not return top tracks for this artist in the configured market.

history.title: Snapshot history
history.description: This view compares the snapshots StageLink has already stored in the selected range.
history.empty: You need at least two snapshots in this range before StageLink can show changes over time.

scope.title: What linking Spotify gives you right now
scope.description: StageLink currently reads safe public artist-level data from Spotify and turns it into snapshots over time.

includes.profile: Artist profile basics from Spotify's public artist endpoint
includes.followers: Public follower count when Spotify returns it
includes.top_tracks: Top tracks for the configured market when Spotify allows them

not_included.locations: Listener locations by country or city
not_included.monthly_listeners: Monthly listeners from Spotify for Artists

settings.helper_title: Configure here, read metrics in Analytics
settings.helper_description: Use Settings to validate or update the Spotify artist StageLink should track. Then switch to Analytics to sync snapshots and review history.

analytics.no_connection_description: Open Settings to validate a Spotify artist and save the connection before you expect analytics here.

spotify.empty_synced: Spotify is connected, but no snapshot has been stored yet. Run a sync to pull your first set of metrics.

youtube.setup_required: YouTube Insights needs `YOUTUBE_DATA_API_KEY` configured on this deployment before artists can connect their channels.

fields.channel_input: YouTube channel URL, @handle, or channel ID
fields.channel_input_hint_locked: StageLink uses the YouTube channel saved in your artist profile. To change it, update your profile first.
fields.channel_input_hint_profile_required: Add your YouTube channel in your artist profile first. Insights will only connect the same channel saved there.

messages.validate_error: Could not validate the YouTube channel right now.
messages.connect_error: Could not save the YouTube channel right now.
messages.sync_error: Could not sync YouTube insights right now.
messages.profile_required: Before using YouTube Insights, save your own YouTube channel in Profile so StageLink can verify the connection belongs to your artist account.
messages.subscribers_hidden: This channel hides its public subscriber count, so StageLink shows channel views and video activity instead.

recent_videos.title: Recent videos
recent_videos.empty: YouTube did not return recent public uploads for this channel right now.

history.title: Snapshot history
history.description: StageLink keeps each sync as a lightweight snapshot so you can compare public channel changes over time.
history.empty: You need at least two snapshots in this range before StageLink can show changes over time.

scope.title: What linking YouTube gives you right now
scope.description: StageLink currently reads safe public channel-level data from YouTube and stores it as snapshots over time.

includes.channel: Channel title, image, and public channel URL
includes.subscribers: Subscriber count when the channel keeps it public
includes.views: Total public channel views and video count
includes.recent_videos: Recent public uploads with lightweight view counts

not_included.watch_time: Watch time, retention, and advanced video analytics
not_included.geography: Audience geography or traffic source breakdowns

settings.helper_title: Configure here, read metrics in Analytics
settings.helper_description: Use Settings to align the trusted YouTube channel from your profile. Then open Analytics to sync snapshots and review channel changes over time.

analytics.no_connection_description: Open Settings to validate the YouTube channel from your profile before you expect channel metrics here.

youtube.empty_synced: YouTube is connected, but no snapshot has been stored yet. Run a sync to pull your first set of metrics.

spotify.title: Spotify
spotify.description: Public Spotify artist signals stored as snapshots inside StageLink, so you can follow changes over time.
spotify.limitations: Spotify does not expose a public Spotify for Artists analytics API here. StageLink shows public artist-level data only, and top tracks remain market-dependent.

youtube.title: YouTube
youtube.description: Public YouTube channel metrics and recent uploads stored as snapshots inside StageLink, so you can follow channel momentum over time.
youtube.limitations: StageLink currently uses public YouTube Data API signals only. Private YouTube Analytics metrics like watch time, revenue, traffic sources, and audience geography are not included in this phase.

soundcloud.title: SoundCloud
soundcloud.description: Best fit for profile basics and carefully scoped public-summary data.
soundcloud.limitations: SoundCloud analytics access is more limited. The MVP should only promise safe public summary data unless a documented owner flow becomes available.

foundation_scope.title: What is live in this phase
foundation_scope.description: Spotify and YouTube now run on the real Insights foundation: provider abstraction, normalized snapshots, date-range filters, sync state, and a protected PRO+ dashboard ready to grow platform by platform.
foundation_scope.current_plan: You are viewing StageLink Insights with the current effective plan: {plan}.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage the core artist identity StageLink reuses across your public page, Press Kit (EPK), platform references, analytics connections, and SEO.

sections.images_hint: Changes are saved immediately after uploading.
sections.social_hint: Add your links so fans can find you everywhere. Leave blank to hide.
sections.seo_hint: Control how your page appears in search results.

fields.contact_email_hint: Public booking or press contact. Not used for login.
fields.username_readonly_hint: Username changes require identity verification and are not available yet.

placeholders.display_name: e.g. The Midnight, DJ Snake, Rosalía…
placeholders.bio: Tell your fans a bit about yourself…
placeholders.seo_description: A short description of your music, style and what fans can find here…

categories.hint: Choose up to 3. Tap again to remove.

descriptors.title: Descriptors
descriptors.hint: Add up to 6 descriptors like genres, niches, or vibes.
descriptors.empty: Add descriptors such as Hard Techno, Alternative Rock, or Educational.
descriptors.placeholder: Type a genre, niche, or style…

translations.title: Localized content
translations.description: Add optional translated text for your public page. Base content above remains the fallback.
translations.base_locale_description: Choose the language your main profile fields are written in. If another locale is incomplete, StageLink will fall back to this base content.
translations.fallback_note: {locale} visitors will see this copy when it exists. Otherwise StageLink falls back to your base content.
translations.base_edit_title: This is your base content locale
translations.base_edit_description: Edit the main profile fields above to update {locale}. Additional locale tabs are only for translated variants.
translations.copy_from_base_description: Fill these fields with an automatic translation from {sourceLocale} to {locale}. You can edit everything after the translation is inserted.
translations.auto_translate_success: Automatic translation inserted. You can edit any field before saving.
translations.auto_translate_error: Automatic translation failed. Check your translation setup and try again in a moment.
translations.lock_description: Additional locales are available on Pro+. You can keep editing your base profile, but translated public content needs the multi-language pages feature.

placeholders.bio: Translated short bio for this locale…

gallery.title: My gallery
gallery.description: Upload up to 6 artist photos here. You can reuse them later inside an Image Gallery block on your page.
gallery.helper: JPEG, PNG or WebP · max 8 MB

translations.title: Localized EPK content
translations.description: Add locale-specific EPK copy for public routes. Base EPK fields above remain the fallback.
translations.base_locale_description: Choose the language your main EPK fields are written in. If another locale is incomplete, public EPK routes fall back to this base content.
translations.fallback_note: {locale} visitors will see this copy when it exists. Otherwise StageLink falls back to your base EPK content.
translations.base_edit_title: This is your base EPK locale
translations.base_edit_description: Edit the main EPK fields above to update {locale}. Additional locale tabs are only for translated variants.
translations.copy_from_base_description: Fill these fields with an automatic translation from {sourceLocale} to {locale}. You can edit everything after the translation is inserted.
translations.auto_translate_success: Automatic translation inserted. You can edit any field before saving.
translations.auto_translate_error: Automatic translation failed. Check your translation setup and try again in a moment.
translations.lock_description: Additional locales are available on Pro+. Your base EPK stays available, but locale-specific public EPK content needs the multi-language pages feature.

placeholders.headline: Genre, positioning, key context…
placeholders.short_bio: Localized short bio for this locale
placeholders.full_bio: Longer localized artist story for this locale
placeholders.press_quote: Optional localized quote from media, curator or promoter
placeholders.availability: Localized travel, logistics, and availability notes
placeholders.rider: Localized hospitality, guest list, and artist-side requirements
placeholders.tech_requirements: Localized DJ setup, sound, lights, screens, and technical needs

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: See your current plan, compare upgrades, and manage billing from one place.

messages.checkout_success: Checkout completed. Stripe will sync your subscription in a few seconds.
messages.checkout_confirmed: Your subscription is active in StageLink and your access is up to date.
messages.checkout_syncing: Stripe completed your checkout, but StageLink is still confirming the subscription. This usually resolves in a few seconds.
messages.checkout_canceled: Checkout was canceled. Your current subscription has not changed.
messages.checkout_error: We could not start Stripe Checkout. Please try again.
messages.portal_error: We could not open the Stripe Billing Portal. Please try again.
messages.refresh_error: We could not refresh your billing status from Stripe. Please try again.
messages.refresh_completed: We refreshed your billing details from Stripe.
messages.portal_returned: Your billing information was refreshed. If you changed your subscription in Stripe, StageLink will reflect it here.
messages.portal_syncing: We detected a return from the billing portal and are refreshing your subscription details.
messages.sync_pending: We are still confirming your latest billing update. Product access stays conservative until Stripe webhooks finish syncing.
messages.summary_load_error: We could not load your billing summary. Please try again.
messages.access_differs: Product access is currently resolved as {effectivePlan} while billing is still on {billingPlan} ({status}). StageLink uses effective access for feature gating.
messages.cancels_at_period_end: Your paid access stays active until {date}.
messages.access_until_period_end: Your subscription was canceled, but access remains active until {date}.
messages.payment_issue_access_retained: We detected a payment issue. Access remains active until {date} while Stripe retries or the billing state is resolved.
messages.payment_issue_access_revoked: We detected a payment issue and premium access is currently disabled until the subscription is recovered.
messages.subscription_canceled: Your subscription is no longer active.
messages.no_active_subscription: No active paid subscription is currently granting premium access.

status_descriptions.canceling: Active until the current period ends
status_descriptions.pending_checkout: Checkout completed but Stripe confirmation is still pending

sections.available_plans_description: Compare what Free, Pro, and Pro+ unlock inside the product.
sections.features_description: These highlights come directly from your effective entitlements.
sections.actions_description: Upgrade when you need more features, or open Stripe to manage billing details.

plan_card.current_description: This is the plan currently attached to your subscription.
plan_card.billing_description: This is the plan still attached to billing while effective product access is resolved separately.
plan_card.effective_description: This is the plan currently granting access inside the product.
plan_card.available_description: A simple upgrade path you can start directly from the dashboard.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your plan, billing, and external product connections for this artist workspace.

navigation.title: Settings sections
navigation.description: Open the part of Settings you want to configure.

overview.plans_billing: Choose your plan, review what each tier unlocks, and manage billing from one home base.
overview.insights_connections: Connect the artist platforms StageLink uses for Insights, then read metrics later inside Analytics.
overview.shopify_store: Validate your Shopify storefront, decide what merch to show, and keep that setup tied to this artist workspace.
overview.smart_merch: Connect Printful, review product availability, and control the merch source your blocks can use.

support.title: Need help with your setup?
support.description: If you run into a bug, want a change, or need help connecting one of these tools, contact the support center and we will take a look.

summary.title: Plan capabilities
summary.description: StageLink currently resolves this tenant as {plan}. Backend gating uses this effective plan, not only the billing UI.
summary.backend_source: The backend is the source of truth for feature authorization.
summary.webhook_note: Plan changes take effect after Stripe webhooks synchronize the tenant subscription.
summary.syncing_note: Stripe billing is still syncing. Product gating stays conservative until the latest billing state is confirmed.

plans.title: Plans and billing
plans.description: Pick the plan that fits your artist project, then use Settings as the home for upgrades, billing, and connected features.
plans.current_description: This is the plan currently attached to your billing.
plans.access_description: This plan is currently granting product access while billing finishes syncing.
plans.available_description: Upgrade here when you want to unlock more of StageLink.
plans.manage_title: Need to downgrade, cancel, or return to Free?
plans.manage_description: Use the billing portal for plan changes that are better handled directly in Stripe. You can still open the full billing screen anytime.

insights.title: StageLink Insights connections
insights.description: Connect the external artist platforms StageLink uses for Insights. Configuration lives here; metrics and snapshot history live in Analytics.

lock.description: StageLink Insights is available on Pro+.
lock.copy: Your current plan is {currentPlan}. Upgrade to Pro+ to connect Spotify, YouTube, and future platform insights inside StageLink.

helper.title: Connections first, numbers second
helper.description: Use this section to validate and save platform references. Then open Analytics to sync snapshots, compare ranges, and read your connected metrics.

spotify.title: Spotify connection
spotify.description: Choose which Spotify artist StageLink should validate and sync for public profile signals.

youtube.title: YouTube connection
youtube.description: YouTube Insights uses the channel saved in your artist profile as the trusted source of truth.

soundcloud.title: SoundCloud
soundcloud.description: SoundCloud support is planned next. We keep the connection slot here so setup stays in Settings when that flow lands.
soundcloud.copy: For now, keep your public SoundCloud URL updated in Profile. That gives StageLink the right identity reference for the future SoundCloud sync flow.
soundcloud.profile_missing: No SoundCloud URL is saved in your artist profile yet.

shopify.title: Shopify storefront
shopify.description: Connect a Shopify store, validate credentials, and choose what merch to show on your public page.

lock.description: Shopify storefront is available on Pro+.
lock.copy: Your current plan is {currentPlan}. Upgrade to Pro+ to connect a Shopify store and publish merch on your public page.

hints.store_domain: Use the store hostname only, without https:// or any path.
hints.storefront_token: Saved securely on the backend and never exposed on the public page.
hints.token_saved: Leave blank to keep the saved token
hints.collection_handle: StageLink will pull products from this Shopify collection handle.
hints.product_handles: One product handle per line, or separate them with commas.

messages.validate_error: Could not validate this Shopify connection.
messages.no_preview: No preview products were returned for the current selection.
messages.disconnect_error: Could not disconnect this Shopify store.

merch.title: Smart Merch
merch.description: Connect Printful, validate your token, and use real merch products inside Smart Merch blocks.

lock.description: Smart Merch is available on Pro+.
lock.copy: Your current plan is {currentPlan}. Upgrade to Pro+ to connect Printful and publish merch blocks on your public page.

hints.provider: Printful is the first Smart Merch provider. Printify can plug into the same architecture later.
hints.api_token: Stored on the backend and never exposed on your public page.
hints.token_saved: Leave blank to keep the saved token

messages.save_error: Could not save Smart Merch settings.
messages.validate_error: Could not validate this Printful connection.
messages.no_preview: No products are available yet for this connected Printful store.
messages.disconnect_error: Could not disconnect this Printful connection.

preview.title: Preview products
preview.description: These products are available to select inside your Smart Merch block.

remove_stagelink_branding.title: Remove StageLink branding
remove_stagelink_branding.description: Hide StageLink branding from the public experience.
remove_stagelink_branding.note: Branding controls are not shipped yet, but this gate is reserved for the Pro plan.

custom_domain.title: Custom domain
custom_domain.description: Connect your own domain to your public page.
custom_domain.note: Custom domain activation is still pending implementation. The entitlement is already modeled for backend enforcement.

shopify_integration.title: Shopify integration
shopify_integration.description: Connect storefront commerce flows to the artist experience.
shopify_integration.note: Connect a Shopify Storefront token, choose a collection or product handles, and render merch cards on the public page.

smart_merch.title: Smart Merch
smart_merch.description: Show real merch products from an external provider without building checkout yourself.
smart_merch.note: Connect Printful in Settings, choose products inside the block editor, and send fans to an external purchase URL.

stage_link_insights.title: StageLink Insights
stage_link_insights.description: Access the unified dashboard for connected platform analytics inside StageLink.
stage_link_insights.note: This first foundation models connections, snapshots, and platform capabilities. Real OAuth flows and scheduled sync land in the next Epic.

epk_builder.title: EPK builder
epk_builder.description: Create and publish richer press-kit experiences.
epk_builder.note: EPK builder is not implemented yet. The entitlement is reserved for Pro and above.

analytics_pro.title: Advanced analytics
analytics_pro.description: Unlock the 365-day analytics range and future premium breakdowns.
analytics_pro.note: This gate is enforced today on the private analytics API.

multi_language_pages.title: Multi-language pages
multi_language_pages.description: Publish localized versions of your public page.
multi_language_pages.note: Create localized public-page copy with locale-aware SEO metadata and fallback handling.

advanced_fan_insights.title: Advanced fan insights
advanced_fan_insights.description: Access deeper audience signals and future premium reporting.
advanced_fan_insights.note: Advanced fan insights are not implemented yet. This capability is reserved for Pro+.

blocks.title: My Page
blocks.description: Build your artist page with blocks.
blocks.empty_description: Add your first block to start building your page.
blocks.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this block? This action cannot be undone.

type_descriptions.links: Add clickable links to your profiles, website or anywhere.
type_descriptions.music_embed: Embed a track or playlist from Spotify, SoundCloud and more.
type_descriptions.video_embed: Embed a video from YouTube, Vimeo or TikTok.
type_descriptions.email_capture: Collect fan signups from your page and feed StageLink fan insights.
type_descriptions.text: Add a text block for a bio, technical rider, artist requirements, or any public info you already have ready.
type_descriptions.image_gallery: Show a gallery using images you already uploaded in My gallery.
type_descriptions.shopify_store: Show selected merch from your connected Shopify storefront.
type_descriptions.smart_merch: Pick real products from Printful and attach an external purchase link for each one.

fields.title: Block title (optional)
fields.label: Label
fields.headline: Headline
fields.consent_label_placeholder: e.g. I agree to receive updates from this artist.
fields.body_placeholder: Write a short bio, press note, technical rider, or any public text you want to show on the page…
fields.reuse_section_hint: Pull saved text from Profile or Press Kit instead of rewriting it here.
fields.body_locale_hint: Text blocks currently use your base language. If you need different copy by language, duplicate the block for now.
fields.image_gallery_hint: Pick the profile gallery images you want to show in this block.
fields.image_gallery_empty: Add gallery images in My Profile first
fields.image_gallery_from_profile: This block only uses images already uploaded in My gallery.
fields.image_gallery_minimum: Select at least 2 images and up to 6.
fields.shopify_description_placeholder: Add a short intro above the merch cards.
fields.shopify_settings_hint: Shopify products and collections are configured in Dashboard > Settings.
fields.shopify_localized_hint: These fields are optional per locale. Base merch copy above remains the fallback when a locale is empty.
fields.smart_merch_provider_hint: Connect Printful first in Dashboard > Settings. This block only stores what to show and where fans should buy it.
fields.smart_merch_subtitle_placeholder: Add a short intro above the Smart Merch products.
fields.smart_merch_settings_hint: Select up to 12 products. Each product needs its own external purchase URL.
fields.smart_merch_purchase_url_required_title: Every selected product needs a purchase link
fields.smart_merch_purchase_url_required_hint: StageLink shows the merch card, but checkout stays external. We prefill the provider URL when one is available, and you can replace it with Shopify, Etsy, or any valid purchase page.
fields.smart_merch_products_hint: Choose the Printful products you want to feature and add the external link where fans can buy each one.
fields.smart_merch_products_empty: No Printful products are available yet. Connect the provider in Settings and sync at least one product first.
fields.smart_merch_products_error: Could not load Printful products right now.
fields.smart_merch_products_missing_artist: Select an artist page before configuring Smart Merch.
fields.smart_merch_purchase_url_prefill: Prefilled from the provider product URL. Replace it if you want fans to buy somewhere else.
fields.smart_merch_purchase_url_missing_provide: Add the external checkout or product page where fans should buy this item.
fields.smart_merch_localized_hint: These fields are optional per locale. Base Smart Merch copy above remains the fallback when a locale is empty.

smart_link.label: Internal name
smart_link.destinations_required: At least one destination is required.
smart_link.url_required: All destinations must have a URL.
smart_link.delete_confirm: Delete this smart link? Any blocks using it will show a broken link. This cannot be undone.

create_dialog.title: Add a block
create_dialog.subtitle: Choose the type of block to add to your page.

email_capture.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
email_capture.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
email_capture.preview_hint: Form is inactive in preview mode.
email_capture.consent_default: I agree to receive updates from this artist.
email_capture.consent_required: Please accept the terms to continue.

shopify_store.title: Merch
shopify_store.empty: Connect Shopify in Settings and choose products or a collection to show merch here.

smart_merch.title: Smart Merch
smart_merch.empty: Connect Printful in Settings, choose products in the block editor, and add purchase URLs to show merch here.

public_page.booking_copy: Use this contact for bookings, collaborations, or press requests.
public_page.presskit_copy: Open the public press kit or jump straight to the print-friendly version.
public_page.fan_list_copy: Turn casual visitors into fans with a simple signup block.

branding_slot.title: Create your own StageLink page
branding_slot.secondary: Publish links, embeds, fan capture, and more with <brand>StageLink</brand>. Create your account <signup>here</signup>.

public_page.not_found_description: This artist page doesn't exist or isn't available right now.

consent_banner.notice: This page counts page views and link clicks to help the artist understand their audience. Clicking "Got it" enables additional analytics. No personal data is sold or shared.

metadata.print_not_found: EPK print view not found — StageLink

onboarding.title: StageLink
onboarding.subtitle: Let's set up your artist page

stepName.heading: What's your artist name?
stepName.description: This is the name your fans will see on your page.
stepName.label: Artist name
stepName.placeholder: e.g. The Midnight, DJ Snake, Rosalía...

stepCategory.heading: What kind of artist are you?
stepCategory.description: Pick the one that fits best. You can always update this later.

stepAvatar.heading: Add a profile photo
stepAvatar.description: Optional — you can always add or change it later from your settings.

errors.username_invalid: Only letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores are allowed.
errors.username_too_short: Username must be at least 3 characters.
errors.username_too_long: Username must be 30 characters or less.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
